category_title: Anxious children who live in isolation and are reticent
scenario_title: Navigating a congested classroom with strict rules
minimal_context: The student is asked to put away a toy and join the large class for a lesson.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class is starting. Please put your play items away and sit quietly with the rest of the children.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the large group of children, holds onto a small wooden block, and remains completely quiet.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Playing is for free time. Put the block down and join the group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Slowly steps backward away from the teacher, keeping their head down and not saying a word.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You are not following the rules. Come here and sit down right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Retreats further into the corner to hide, crouching down in isolation with an unhappy, fearful expression, completely withdrawing from the interaction.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class is starting. Please put your play items away and sit quietly with the rest of the children.

STUDENT: (Looks at the large group of children, holds onto a small wooden block, and remains completely quiet.)

TUTOR: Playing is for free time. Put the block down and join the group.

STUDENT: (Slowly steps backward away from the teacher, keeping their head down and not saying a word.)

TUTOR: You are not following the rules. Come here and sit down right now.

STUDENT: (Retreats further into the corner to hide, crouching down in isolation with an unhappy, fearful expression, completely withdrawing from the interaction.)
